strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, meeting and slightly exceeding the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq includes active hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, demonstrating early practical AI builder experience
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and community influence through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects, aligning with the responsibility to inspire others internally and externally
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; holds a CS bachelor's and a Fine Arts bachelor's, with no postgraduate AI/ML credentials preferred for this role

AI experience is recent and narrow — limited to agentic tooling at one employer — with no demonstrated history of AI strategy advisory, platform-scale AI product leadership, or recognized AI expertise

Entire career is hands-on engineering with no evidence of director-level IC scope: no strategic customer advisory work, no cross-organization technical leadership, and no public AI thought leadership beyond a single GIS-focused conference talk
response.justification: Bogdan brings a long and genuinely broad engineering career with recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, which satisfies the tenure requirement and shows some current-day relevance; however, the role demands a recognized AI strategist who advises enterprise customers, shapes cloud-AI product direction at scale, and operates as a director-level individual contributor — a profile Bogdan's resume does not yet support, given the absence of advanced AI/ML credentials, enterprise advisory experience, and any demonstrated thought leadership beyond niche open-source and workshop contributions.
